creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Captain_Lesbee_Ziner from comment #12)

> I tried setting the variable but I don't think it worked:
> root@utc:/home/user # sysctl dev.hdac.0.pindump=1
> dev.hdac.0.pindump: 0 -> 0

It worked.  The only purpose of this sysctl is to dump messages to the log shown by dmesg.
